title: Dr. Gillespie's New Assistant
writer: Harry Ruskin, Willis Goldbeck, Lawrence P. Bachmann
actors: Lionel Barrymore, Van Johnson, Susan Peters
plot: Dr. Gillespie's health is failing, and the hospital is urging him to get a new assistant that he doesn't want. So, he poses a stumper in class to discourage all the bright young students. Unfortunately, he gets three smart-alecky ...
